meaning: 奥塞梯[苏联高加索一地区]
examples: South Ossetia has historically always been part of Georgia.
Russia’s recognition of South Ossetia and Abkhazia has made things worse.
Russia's recognition of South Ossetia and Abkhazia has made things worse.
Moscow has given passports to more than 90 percent of people in South Ossetia.
